description: International legal analysis (ISO 31000) across 63 jurisdictions — 15 tools.
name: io.github.djtellado/nexus-legal

environmentVariables.description: Personal API key (format `nlk_*`) with `mcp` scope. Generate one at https://nexusquantum.legal/developers (select 'Servidor MCP' when creating the key).
environmentVariables.name: NEXUS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override base URL of the Nexus backend. Defaults to https://nexusquantum.legal. Change only for self-hosted or staging environments.
environmentVariables.name: NEXUS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for long-running analyses. Default 180000 (3 minutes).
environmentVariables.name: NEXUS_TIMEOUT_MS
